name: Chicken in Phyllo
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Halve the chicken breasts and pound flat with a meat mallet or rolling pin.
3. Melt the butter.
4. Layer 4 sheets of Phyllo, brushing each sheet with melted butter.
5. On each chicken breast sprinkle 1 tablespoon shallots and 1/4 teaspoon sage.
6. Lay 1 ounce Jack cheese on each breast.
7. Roll up each chicken breast tightly in the center of the Phyllo layers, one end at a time. Continue rolling and brushing with butter as you go.
8. Place all rolls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 25 minutes, or until browned. Serve.
(Note: When serving, cutting into the rolls reveals melted cheese.)
